mapper.select:
SELECT dining_id, name, d_type, description, tel, floor, main_img, fk_hotel_id, business_hours FROM tbl_dining
AND fk_hotel_id = #{hotel_id}
AND UPPER(d_type) = UPPER(#{d_type})
ORDER BY dining_id ASC

SELECT dining_id, name, d_type, description, introduction, business_hours, tel, floor, main_img, store_imgs, food_imgs, menu_pdf, extra_info, fk_hotel_id, open_time, close_time, available_times FROM tbl_dining WHERE dining_id = #{dining_id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dining_reservations ( dining_reservation_id, fk_hotel_id, dining_id, fk_member_no, guest_name, guest_phone, guest_email, res_password, adult_count, child_count, infant_count, res_date, res_time, special_requests, allergy_info, status, created_at ) VALUES ( seq_dining_reservation.NEXTVAL, #{fkHotelId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{diningId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{fkMemberNo, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{guestName}, #{guestPhone}, #{guestEmail, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{resPassword, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adultCount}, #{childCount, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{infantCount, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{resDate}, #{resTime}, #{specialRequests, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{allergyInfo, jdbcType=CLOB}, 'CONFIRMED', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT R.*, D.NAME AS diningName FROM dining_reservations R JOIN tbl_dining D ON R.dining_id = D.dining_id WHERE R.dining_reservation_id = #{diningReservationId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT seq_dining_reservation.nextval FROM dual
INSERT INTO dining_reservations ( dining_reservation_id, fk_hotel_id, dining_id, fk_member_no, guest_name, guest_phone, guest_email, res_password, adult_count, child_count, infant_count, res_date, res_time, special_requests, status, created_at ) VALUES ( #{diningReservationId}, #{fkHotelId}, #{diningId}, #{fkMemberNo, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{guestName}, #{guestPhone}, #{guestEmail, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{resPassword, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adultCount}, #{childCount, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{infantCount, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{resDate}, #{resTime}, #{specialRequests, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'CONFIRMED', SYSTIMESTAMP )

INSERT INTO dining_payments ( payment_id, dining_res_no, amount, original_amount, cancellation_fee, payment_method, status, pg_tid, paid_at ) VALUES ( SEQ_DINING_PAYMENTS.nextval, #{resNo, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{amount, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{originalAmount, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, 0, #{paymentMethod, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pgTid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT R.DINING_RESERVATION_ID as diningReservationId, (SELECT D.NAME FROM tbl_dining D WHERE D.DINING_ID = R.DINING_ID) as diningName, R.RES_DATE as resDate, R.RES_TIME as resTime, R.ADULT_COUNT as adultCount, R.CHILD_COUNT as childCount, R.STATUS as status FROM DINING_RESERVATIONS R WHERE R.GUEST_NAME = #{name} AND R.GUEST_EMAIL = #{email} AND R.RES_PASSWORD = #{password} AND R.FK_MEMBER_NO IS NULL ORDER BY R.RES_DATE DESC, R.RES_TIME DESC

SELECT R.dining_reservation_id as diningReservationId, (SELECT D.NAME FROM TBL_DINING D WHERE D.DINING_ID = R.dining_id) as diningName, R.res_date as resDate, R.res_time as resTime, R.adult_count as adultCount, R.child_count as childCount, R.infant_count as infantCount, R.status as status FROM dining_reservations R INNER JOIN TBL_MEMBER_SECURITY M ON R.fk_member_no = M.member_no WHERE M.memberid = #{memberid} ORDER BY R.res_date DESC, R.res_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE DINING_RESERVATIONS SET STATUS = #{status}, UPDATED_AT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE DINING_RESERVATION_ID = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT R.dining_reservation_id as diningReservationId, (SELECT D.NAME FROM TBL_DINING D WHERE D.DINING_ID = R.dining_id) as diningName, R.guest_name as guestName, R.guest_phone as guestPhone, R.res_date as resDate, R.res_time as resTime, R.adult_count as adultCount, R.child_count as childCount, R.status as status, R.fk_member_no as fkMemberNo, R.created_at as createdAt FROM dining_reservations R
AND (R.guest_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR R.guest_phone LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
AND R.status = #{status}
ORDER BY R.res_date DESC, R.res_time DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) as TOTAL, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'CONFIRMED' AND res_date = TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN 1 END) as TODAY_RESERVE, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'VISITED' THEN 1 END) as VISITED, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'NOSHOW' THEN 1 END) as NOSHOW FROM dining_reservations
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dining_reservations ( dining_reservation_id, dining_id, fk_hotel_id, guest_name, guest_phone, res_date, res_time, adult_count, child_count, infant_count, status, created_at ) VALUES ( seq_dining_reservation.nextval, #{diningId}, #{fkHotelId}, #{guestName}, #{guestPhone}, #{resDate}, #{resTime}, #{adultCount}, #{childCount}, #{infantCount}, 'CONFIRMED', SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT res.dining_reservation_id, res.guest_name, res.guest_phone, res.res_date, res.res_time, res.adult_count, res.child_count, res.infant_count, res.status, res.request_term, d.name AS diningName FROM dining_reservations res JOIN tbl_dining d ON res.dining_id = d.dining_id WHERE res.dining_reservation_id = #{resId}
